steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The previous sentence establishes an exception to the evergreen pattern (“not all conifer species are evergreen”), and the current sentence must show a specific example of this exception.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: “For instance” introduces an example, showing that Larch trees exemplify the non-evergreen conifers just mentioned. The other three suggest contrast, simultaneity, or addition—not exemplification. That matches choice A — A is correct.
